name: known-issue
doc: The canonical Tier 2 scenario (design §10 'fixture incidents'): a synthetic checkout-latency alert whose fingerprint exactly matches a seeded prior resolved session, so stage-1 retrieval hits and triage must VALIDATE/INVALIDATE the recall. Drive it with /page ALERT-123 (through /setup and /doctor first), /close, then run assert_run.py. service+alert_type below are the fingerprint inputs assert_run recomputes through bin/bb-fingerprint — they must stay in lockstep with the fingerprint hardcoded in seed.json (bb.fp.v1: 1e53817cc27fbd48).
